    GenericConnectorTestService.testEndpoint(GenericConnectorTestRequest request)
    Executes a test request for the specified connector endpoint.
    GenericConnectorTestResult
    GenericFeedConnector.testEndpoint(String feedSupport, String instrumentType, String ticker, LocalDate fromDate, LocalDate toDate, String fromCurrency, String toCurrency)
    Tests a single endpoint by performing one HTTP request, parsing the response, and returning the result without any side effects (no pagination, no EndpointOption post-processing, no marking endpoint as used).
